title: anthyllis biebersteiniana
intro: Anthyllis biebersteiniana, also known as wild sweetpea or American kidney vetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anthyllis biebersteiniana include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical treatments.
